creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Lukhtionov from comment #0)
> The new version available
I'm well aware of that, but I'm seeing a strange regression* compared to earlier versions which the author cannot reproduce, and I haven't debugged either.  Did you try to play the new version?  It would be nice if you could add your data point to the issue.

*) https://github.com/leezer3/OpenBVE/issues/1098
